notes: batch-importer (a cron job, commit 7e0a4d2 removed the streaming reader and loads the full catalog into memory) saturates node-7's memory. The kubelet sets MemoryPressure on node-7 and OOMKills/evicts CO-LOCATED pods of unrelated services (auth, cart, image-resize). These three services have NO service-call edge connecting them in service_map.json — the only shared link is node-7. A model that only looks at the call graph will see three 'independent' incidents and fail to find a common origin. The correct origin is the node/infra fault (node-7), and propagation is via co-location, not RPC. auth is loudest (most login errors) but is just one co-located victim. batch-importer is accepted as an origin alias since it is the noisy neighbor pod whose code change is the true culprit.
_design_note: Three unrelated services degraded within the same 2-minute window. They do not call each other. Why would independent services fail simultaneously?
